Cross-border renewables.summary: Supports cross-border renewable energy projects that enhance system integration, security of supply and market integration across Member States. Actions focus on joint planning, permitting and deployment of renewable generation and related infrastructure, including grid interconnections and storage solutions, contributing to decarbonisation targets and regional energy resilience.

Submarine Cable Repair Capacities-Pilot.summary: Strengthens Europe’s capacity to repair and maintain critical submarine cable infrastructure through pilot actions supporting specialised vessels, equipment, coordination mechanisms and rapid-response capabilities. The objective is to enhance resilience of digital and energy connectivity, reduce downtime in case of disruption, and improve cross-border cooperation for the protection of strategic infrastructure.
